Paragraph.Sentence:
Extend the following sequence by giving the next two terms:
. . .

response.feedback: Right! You correctly generated the next two terms in the arithmetic sequence.
The student got this item correct.

Sorry, that's incorrect. The sequence given in the problem, 13/12, 13/6, 13/4, 13/3, 65/12,... is an arithmetic sequence. In this case, there is a common difference of 13/12 between terms. To get any term, add 13/12 to the previous term.
The student got this item incorrect.
